item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju dengan pendirian Anda bahwa hak individu penting, tetapi saya juga merasa bahwa dalam konteks Indonesia, kepentingan masyarakat sering kali dipertimbangkan sebagai prioritas utama.

notes: Both agents stay in Indonesian and engage each other's country-specific legal/cultural frames. Agent A softens from clear society-priority into balance at turn 3, then reasserts Indonesian social justice and crisis-policy reasoning at turn 5. Agent B keeps a rights-first U.S. constitutional frame but concedes that rights have crisis limits and collective interests matter when handled transparently.
